title: Develop workplace policy and procedures for environment and sustainability
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop workplace policy and procedures for environment and sustainability demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop workplace environment and sustainability policy

pcs.text: Identify legislative, regulatory and industry requirements relating to environmental sustainability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify legislative, regulatory and industry requirements relating to environmental sustainability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify legislative, regulatory and industry requirements relating to environmental sustainability.

pcs.text: Define scope of environment and sustainability policy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define scope of environment and sustainability policy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define scope of environment and sustainability policy.

pcs.text: Gather information from a range of sources to plan and develop policy

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Gather information from a range of sources to plan and develop policy.

pcs.text: Identify and consult with stakeholders as a key component of the policy development process

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and consult with stakeholders as a key component of the policy development process.

pcs.text: Include appropriate strategies in policy at all stages of work for minimising resource use and employing life cycle management approaches
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Include appropriate strategies in policy at all stages of work for minimising resource use and employing life cycle management approaches?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Include appropriate strategies in policy at all stages of work for minimising resource use and employing life cycle management approaches.

pcs.text: Identify and incorporate strategies to reduce hazardous material use where applicable

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and incorporate strategies to reduce hazardous material use where applicable.

pcs.text: Make recommendations for policy options based on likely effectiveness, timeframes and cost
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make recommendations for policy options based on likely effectiveness, timeframes and cost?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make recommendations for policy options based on likely effectiveness, timeframes and cost.

pcs.text: Develop policy that reflects the organisation's commitment to environment and sustainability work practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop policy that reflects the organisation's commitment to environment and sustainability work practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop policy that reflects the organisation's commitment to environment and sustainability work practices.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate methods of implementation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate methods of implementation.
